message.content: In C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services, find the Dawn theme's header section liquid file. Look for files like sections/header.liquid or similar. Also find any CSS/stylesheet files related to the header (component-header.css, section-header.css, etc in the assets folder). Return the file paths and a brief summary of the header HTML structure (key class names, how the logo is rendered). Thoroughness: medium

content.text: I'll help you find the Dawn theme's header section file and related CSS. Let me search for these files.
Great! I found the header file. Now let me read it to analyze the structure, and also search for any related CSS files:

input.description: Find all files with 'header' in their name

content.text:
Perfect. Now I have all the information needed. Let me provide you with a comprehensive summary. ## Summary I found the Dawn theme's header files in your project. Here are the relevant files: **Main Header File:** - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\sections\header.liquid **Related Supporting Files:** - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\snippets\header-drawer.liquid - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\snippets\header-dropdown-menu.liquid - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\snippets\header-mega-menu.liquid - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\snippets\header-search.liquid **Header-Related CSS Files:** The header uses these component CSS files (linked dynamically in the section): - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-list-menu.css - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-search.css - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-menu-drawer.css - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-cart-notification.css - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-mega-menu.css - C:\Users\colby\buy-property-services\assets\component-price.css (conditional, for predictive search) Note: There is no dedicated section-header.css file; the header styling is handled through inline styles and component-specific CSS files. ## Header HTML Structure Summary **Key Container Classes:** - `header-wrapper` - Outermost wrapper element (can be `
` or `` custom element) - `header` - Main header element with conditional classes: - `header--{logo_position}` (top-left, top-center, middle-left, middle-center) - `header--mobile-{mobile_logo_position}` - `header--has-menu`, `header--has-app`, `header--has-social`, `header--has-account`, `header--has-localizations` **Logo Rendering:** - Logo is wrapped in `` linking to the root URL - Logo image container uses `
` - Logo image element has class `header__heading-logo` (with `motion-reduce` class for animation preference) - On homepage (index), the logo link is wrapped in `

` - If no logo image exists, displays shop name as `{{ shop.name }}` **Main Sections:** 1. Header drawer navigation (conditionally rendered) 2. Logo (positioned top or middle depending on settings) 3. Menu (dropdown, mega, or drawer style based on desktop settings) 4. Icons section (`header__icons`) containing: - Localization forms (country/language selectors) - Search functionality - Account/login link with optional customer avatar - Cart icon with notification bubble **Additional CSS Classes:** - `section-header` - Applied to the entire section for sticky positioning - `menu-drawer-container`, `list-menu`, `list-menu--inline` - Menu structure - `header__icon` - Icon elements (account, cart) - `cart-count-bubble` - Small notification bubble on cart icon - `visually-hidden` - For accessible labels and screen readers
